integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the actual Azure DevOps web interface or a legitimate Git client.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a real web browser or Git GUI, not a text editor where the agent simply typed out the expected answers or branch names.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the deletion of branches.

integrity.description: Verify the actions are performed on the correct TailwindTraders repository.
